title: Pan-Seared Barramundi with Lemon and Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful Australian-inspired dish featuring pan-seared barramundi, served with a squeeze of fresh lemon and a sprinkle of herbs.
instructions: Season the barramundi fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the barramundi for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove from the oven and top each fillet with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of parsley and dill.
Serve immediately, with a side of chicken broth for a flavorful sauce.
